name: Zona de Perigo
terse: Nível de calor em metade da capacidade ou mais.
effects: Characters are in the DANGER ZONE when half or more of their heat is filled in. They’re smoking hot, which enables some attacks, talents, and effects.

name: Caído e Apagado
terse: Piloto está inconsciente; qualquer dano adicional o mata.
effects: Pilots that are DOWN AND OUT are unconscious and STUNNED – if they take any more damage, they die. They'll regain consciousness and half of their HP when they rest.

name: Engajado
terse: Ataques à distância feitos por este personagem recebem +1 de dificuldade. Todo movimento adicional é perdido se ENGAJADO por um alvo de tamanho igual ou maior.
effects: If a character moves adjacent to a hostile character, they both gain the ENGAGED status for as long as they remain adjacent to one another. Ranged attacks made by an ENGAGED character receive +1 difficulty. Additionally, characters that become ENGAGED by targets of equal or greater SIZE during the course of a movement stop moving immediately and lose any unused movement.

name: Exposto
terse: Todo o dano cinético, explosivo ou energético recebido por este personagem é dobrado.
effects: Characters become EXPOSED when they’re dealing with runaway heat buildup – their armor is weakened by overheating, their vents are open, and their weapons are spinning down, providing plenty of weak points. All kinetic, explosive, or energy damage taken by EXPOSED characters is doubled, before applying any reductions. A mech can clear EXPOSED by taking the STABILIZE action.

name: Escondido
terse: Este personagem não pode ser alvo de ataques ou ações hostis, não causa engajamento e inimigos só conhecem sua localização aproximada.
effects: HIDDEN characters can’t be targeted by hostile attacks or actions, don’t cause engagement, and enemies only know their approximate location. Attacking, forcing saves, taking reactions, using BOOST, and losing cover all remove HIDDEN after they resolve. Characters can find HIDDEN characters with SEARCH.

name: Invisível
terse: Todos os ataques contra personagens INVISÍVEIS têm 50% de chance de errar antes de uma rolagem de ataque. Personagens INVISÍVEIS podem sempre se ESCONDER, mesmo sem cobertura.
effects:
All attacks against INVISIBLE characters, regardless of type, have a 50 percent chance to miss outright, before an attack roll is made. Roll a dice or flip a coin to determine if the attack misses.
Additionally, INVISIBLE characters can always HIDE, even without cover.

name: Prostrado
terse: Ataques contra alvos PROSTRADOS recebem +1 de precisão. Personagens PROSTRADOS são LENTOS e contam como se movendo em terreno difícil.
effects:
Attacks against PRONE targets receive +1 accuracy.
Additionally, PRONE characters are SLOWED and count as moving in difficult terrain. Characters can remove PRONE by standing up instead of taking their standard move, unless they’re IMMOBILIZED. Standing up doesn’t count as movement, so doesn’t trigger OVERWATCH or other effects.

name: Desligado
terse: Enquanto DESLIGADO, mechas são ATORDOADOS indefinidamente.
effects:
When a mech is SHUT DOWN:
• all heat is cleared and the EXPOSED status is removed;
• any cascading NHPs are stabilised and no longer cascading;
• any statuses and conditions affecting the mech caused by tech actions, such as LOCK ON, immediately end.
SHUT DOWN mechs have IMMUNITY to all tech actions and attacks, including any from allied characters.
While SHUT DOWN, mechs are STUNNED indefinitely. Nothing can prevent this condition, and it remains until the mech ceases to be SHUT DOWN.

name: Imobilizado
terse: Personagens IMOBILIZADOS não podem fazer nenhum movimento voluntário.
effects: IMMOBILIZED characters cannot make any voluntary movements, although involuntary movements are unaffected.

name: Impedido
terse: Personagens IMPEDIDOS recebem +1 de dificuldade em todos os ataques, salvamentos e testes de perícia.
effects: IMPAIRED characters receive +1 difficulty on all attacks, saves, and skill checks.

name: Bloqueado
terse: Personagens BLOQUEADOS não podem usar comunicações, fazer ataques além de IMPROVISAR ATAQUE, AGARRAR e EMPURRAR, tomar reações, ou se beneficiar de ações tecnológicas.
effects:
JAMMED characters can’t:
• use comms to talk to other characters;
• make attacks, other than IMPROVISED ATTACK, GRAPPLE, and RAM;
• take reactions, or take or benefit from tech actions.

name: Travado em Mira
terse: Personagens hostis podem consumir TRAVADO EM MIRA para +1 de precisão em seu próximo ataque contra este personagem.
effects:
Hostile characters can choose to consume a character’s LOCK ON condition in exchange for +1 accuracy on their next attack against that character.
LOCK ON is also required to use some talents and systems.

name: Dilacerado
terse: Personagens DILACERADOS não se beneficiam de ARMADURA ou RESISTÊNCIA.
effects: SHREDDED characters don’t benefit from ARMOR or RESISTANCE.

name: Lento
terse: Este personagem não pode IMPULSIONAR ou fazer quaisquer movimentos especiais concedidos por talentos, sistemas ou armas.
effects: The only movement SLOWED characters can make is their standard move, on their own turn – they can’t BOOST or make any special moves granted by talents, systems, or weapons.

name: Atordoado
terse: Mechas ATORDOADOS não podem SOBRECARREGAR, mover-se ou realizar quaisquer ações.
effects:
STUNNED mechs cannot OVERCHARGE, move, or take any actions – including free actions and reactions. Pilots can still MOUNT, DISMOUNT, or EJECT from STUNNED mechs, and can take actions normally.
STUNNED mechs have a maximum of 5 EVASION, and automatically fail all HULL and AGILITY checks and saves.
